plain_english_summary: Deterministic speech-prosody encoding lane with verified compression and fidelity, and a current lane verdict of FAIL because retrieval closure missed its gate.
commercial_wedge: For speech-technology and voice-analytics teams that need deterministic, reproducible encoding of prosodic features. Business value: auditability and reproducibility in speech analysis while retrieval redesign remains the active blocker.
technical_wedge: Deterministic prosody compression via delta + zigzag + varint + RLE + zlib pipeline applied to speech-prosody signals. PRO-C001 through PRO-C004 PASS, PRO-C005 PAUSED_EXTERNAL, PRO-C006 FAIL. Retrieval closure below threshold.
ideal_first_buyer: Speech-technology or voice-analytics infrastructure team needing deterministic prosodic signal encoding and auditable replay, with the current lane blocker understood.
deployment_model: Python package (`pip install zpe-prosody`) plus editable repo install (`pip install -e '.[dev]'`). FastAPI wrapper available via `.[api]` extra.
proof_anchors: PRO-C001 PASS: core codec round-trip fidelity
PRO-C003 PASS: prosodic feature extraction fidelity
PRO-C004 PASS: unit test and integration coverage
not_claimed: PRO-C005 PAUSED_EXTERNAL — blocked on external dependency
PRO-C006 FAIL — retrieval closure below threshold
No claim of released commercial deployment readiness
family_position: Validates ZPE encoding applicability to speech-prosody signal domains. Lane verdict FAIL. Active proof lane alongside other validation-tier products.
